design_philosophy: Internal operations tool prioritizing clarity, speed, and data density over decoration. Objective, rigid, functional.

monospace.usage: Crucial for emails, phone numbers, and system IDs for fast scanning.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Dense and compact. Prioritize data visibility over whitespace.

components.chips: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
components.side_panel: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white shadow-2xl border-l border-slate-200 z-50 transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out
components.buttons: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none px-4 py-2
components.inputs: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

iconography.style: Regular or bold weights depending on active state. Sharp, technical.

avatars.description: Professional headshot of a woman smiling

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use Manrope for standard interface text and JetBrains Mono exclusively for emails, phone numbers, and IDs.
Skip the standard Shadcn 'Card' wrapper for the main People Directory table; allow it to fill the viewport width for maximum data density.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, table rows, input fields, and tab toggles).
Implement the 'Person Detail' and 'Chat Assistant' as sliding side panels rather than separate pages to maintain workflow context.
For the Duplicate Review Queue, use a side-by-side comparison layout with sticky headers to facilitate fast merging.
Campaign chips are the primary visual focus in tables: use the `status` color objects (Emerald for active, Amber for duplicates).
Empty states should be actionable (e.g., a dashed dropzone for 'Import your first sheet') rather than a blank table.
The application should default routing directly to the People Directory, bypassing any generic dashboard overview if not authenticated.
For navigation, implement a dense, functional sidebar using the brand's Indigo-600 for active states.
